creator: rigoletto@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Nuno Teixeira from comment #1)

Btw, IIRC and if nothing changed LeftWM comes with no default configuration, it simple doesn't work without some previous cooked configuration. Albeit you find everything to start up in their Github WIKI.

Its building in here, there are some dependencies being build first (including rust) and then should take some time.

Thank you.
